subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: In the realm of the Kingdom they possess no station, yet in relation to creation it is known that they differ from others [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در حیز ملکوت مقامی ندارند ولکن بالنسبه بخلق معلوم است آنها از دیگران
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love of God
